description: Letter from a merchant to his business partner. Mid-11th century. Regarding a journey to Spain (mentions Cordoba and Granada), the Sultan’s ship, and some information about the wheat’s price. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #803) VMR
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
